sections.sectionTitle: Pasian' Kha Siangtho' Deihna tawh Nuntakna

verses.text: Ahi zongin tu-in ahih leh Khrih Jesuh tawh kipawlin a nungta mite pen mawhna thukhenna tawh kipelh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih Jesuh tawh a hong kipawlsak Kha Siangtho in mawhna leh sihna a piangsak thukham panin kei hong suaktasak khinta hi

Mihingte thahatlo ihih manin Thukham in a hih zawhloh thute Pasian in a hihzo hi. Mawhna a beisak theihna dingin mihingte sunga om mawhna tungah thu a khenna-in ama Tapa hong sawl a, amah pen mihingte' mawhna lungsim mah a nei-in a hong pai hi
Eite' deihna bangin nungta loin Pasian' Kha Siangtho' deihna bangin a nungta eite sungah Thukham' deihna teng a kicin' theihna dingin Pasian in a Tapa a hong sawl ahi hi
Amau pumpi deihna bangin a nungtate, amau pumpi deihna in a lungsim uh a uk hi; Kha Siangtho deihna bangin a nungtate, Kha Siangtho in amau lungsim a uk hi
I ngaihsutna, i pumpi deihna uksak lehang sihna tawh kizom hi; i ngaihsutna, Kha Siangtho uksak lehang nuntakna leh nopsakna tawh a kizom hi
Mi khatpeuh in ama pumpi deihna a ki-uksak ciangin Pasian' thukhamte zuilo ahih manin Pasian' gal suak a, a zuihnop hangin zong zui theilo hi
Amau pumpi deihna bangin a gamtate in Pasian lungdamsak theilo uh hi
Note sungah Pasian' Kha Siangtho hong om nak leh nomau pumpi deihna bangin gamta loin Kha Siangtho deihna bangin na gamta ding uh hi. Khrih lungsim a neilote Khrih tawh kipawllo hi
Ahi zongin note sungah Khrih hong om leh mawhna hangin na pumpi uh a si veve ding ahi zongin, note pen Pasian tawh kipawlkhin na hih manun note-a' dingin Kha Siangtho pen nuntakna ahi hi
Sihna panin Jesuh a thokiksak Pasian' Kha Siangtho note sungah hong om leh sihna panin Khrih a hingkik sakpa mah in note sungah a om ama Kha Siangtho mah tawh a sithei pumpi a hong nungtasak ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin lawmte aw, i pumpi deihna bang zui-in gamtat ding a kiphamawh hilo hi
Na pumpi uh deihna zui-in na gamtat uh leh na si ding uh a, ahi zongin Kha Siangtho huhna tawh na mawh gamtatnate uh na sihsak uh leh na nungta ding uh hi
Pasian' Kha Siangtho in a makaih mite, Pasian' tate ahi uh hi

Note tungah Pasian in a hong piak a Kha Siangtho in note na launa dingun sila-in a hong bawl hilo a, Kha Siangtho in Pasian' tate a hong suaksak ahi zaw hi. Tua Kha Siangtho mah in Pasian pen, “Pa aw, Pa aw,” hong ci theisak hi
Eite, Pasian' tate ihihna thu eima lungsim bek in a gen hiloin Pasian' Kha Siangtho in zong hong genpih hi

Eite pen ama ta ihih manin mite-a' dingin a koih thuphate i ngah banah Khrih-a' dingin a koihte zong i ngahkhawm lai ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih in a thuak mah bangin i thuak nak leh amah a minthan' mah bangin ei zong i minthang ding hi
Tuhuna i thuaknate pen Pasian in a hong piakding minthan'na tawh ka ngaihsut khawm ciangin, tuhuna i thuaknate gentham ka sa het kei hi
Pasian' bawlsa khempeuh in Pasian' tate a hong kilahkhiat hun ding lawp mahmahin a ngak uh hi
Pasian' bawlsate, amau utthu tawh hiloin siatna a thuak dingin Pasian mahmah in a ngaihsutsa ahi hi. Ahi zongin lametna omlai hi
Pasian' bawlsate, nikhat ni ciangin muattheihna ding thu panin suakta-in Pasian' tate tawh a nuam suahtakna a ngahkhawm ding uh hi
Tuhun ciangdong Pasian' bawlsa khempeuh nupi nausuak ding bangin na sa-in a tauna uh i thei hi

Pasian' bawlsa nate bek hilo a, Pasian' hong piakkhong Kha Siangtho maleep a ngah eite mahmah nangawn in zong, Pasian in ama tate-in hong bawlin i buppi-in a hong suahtaksak ding i ngakkawmin thumin tau-in i om hi
Hih bangin lamenin i upna in eite hong honkhia khin hi. Ahi zongin i lamet pen i muh ciangin tua pen lamet hi nawnlo hi. Kua in a muhsa nate lamen nawn ahi hiam
I muhlohte i lamet ciangin lungduai takin i ngak thei hi

Tua ahih manin eite bangzahin ginalo hita lehang eite a hong huh dingin Kha Siangtho a hong pai hi. Eite in a kilawm bangin thunget ding nangawn i thei kei a, ahi zongin Kha Siangtho mah in tauna tawh eite-a' dingin a hong thumsak hi
Kha Siangtho in Pasian' deihna tawh kizui-in Pasian' mite-a' dingin hong thumsak ahih manin mihingte' lungsimtawng thu a thei Pasian in Kha Siangtho' ngaihsutna a thei hi.
Ama deihna bang a sem dingin Pasian in a hong sap, amah a it eite-a' dingin na khempeuh a hoihlamin piangsak hi, ci-in i thei hi
Pasian' Tapa mi khempeuh lakah a upa pen a suahtheihna dingin Pasian in a teelkholhsa mite, a Tapa tawh a kibang dingin a sehsa ahi hi
Tua ahih manin ama sap mite a sehsa hi a, a sap mite amah tawh a kipawlin bawl a, amah tawh a kipawlin a bawl mite ama minthan'na zong a hawm hi
Hihteng bang ahih khit ciangin bang gen ding om nawn ahi hiam? Pasian in eite hong koppih peuh leh kua in eite hong zo zo ding ahi hiam
Ama Tapa nangawn sitloin eite khempeuh-a' dingin hong piakhia ahih manin, na dang khempeuh zong hong piazaw kan ding hilo ahi hiam
Pasian in mawhlo hi, ci-in a gen khitsa ahih manin, Pasian' teelsa mite tungah kua in mawhna guan'thei nawnding ahi hiam
Tua ahih manin kua in amaute tungah thu khenthei nawnding ahi hiam? Eite-a' dingin a hong thumsakpa pen Pasian' taklamah a tu, a sih khit ciangin sihna panin a kihing kiksak Khrih Jesuh hilo ahi hiam
Tua ahih manin bang in Khrih' itna tawh hong kikhensakzo ding ahi hiam? Haksatna, lungkhamna, bawlsiatna, gilkialna, zawn'na, lauhuaina, sihnate khat peuhpeuh in hong khenzo ding ahi hiam
Lai Siangtho sungah zong, “Note hangin sunthapai-in siatna ding lauhuaina ka thuak uh a, gawhding tuu bangin a hong kibawl hi,” ci-in a kigelh hi
Eite a hong itpa' hangin hih thu khempeuhah a gualzo pente ihi hi
Bangmah in ama hong itna tawh hong kikhensakzo hetlo ding hi, ci-in ka thei hi. Sihna, nuntakna, vantung mite, vantung vangliatnate, tuhun nate leh a hong tungding nate
leitunga om nate, leinuai-a om nate, Pasian' bawlsa nate khat peuhpeuh in i Topa Khrih Jesuh hangin Pasian in eite hong itna tawh hong khenzo hetlo ding hi.
